languages.text: "Что навело вас на мысль, что изображенный клинок — не просто парадное оружие, Ваша Светлость?"

traits.locale_text: "Что навело вас на мысль, что изображенный клинок — не просто парадное оружие Вольного Торговца, Ваша Светлость?"
traits.speaker: HighFactotum

languages.text: "What gave you the notion that the blade depicted was more than just a ceremonial weapon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
languages.original_text: "Что навело вас на мысль, что изображенный клинок — не просто парадное оружие, Ваша Светлость?"

traits.locale_text: "What gave you the notion that the blade depicted was more than just a ceremonial weapon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
"What gave you the notion that the blade depicted was more than just a ceremonial weapon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
"What gave you the notion that the blade depicted was more than just a ceremonial weapon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

languages.text: “是什么让您觉得那画中的剑不只是仪式佩剑，大人？”
languages.original_text: "What gave you the notion that the blade depicted was more than just a ceremonial weapon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: “是什么让您觉得那画中的剑不只是仪式佩剑，大人？”

languages.text: «¿Qué le hace pensar que la espada del cuadro no era un simple accesorio ceremonial, mi{mf|lord|lady}?».
languages.original_text: "What gave you the notion that the blade depicted was more than just a ceremonial weapon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué le hace pensar que la espada del cuadro no era un simple accesorio ceremonial, mi{mf|lord|lady}?».

languages.text: « Qu'est-ce qui vous porte à croire que l'épée représentée n'était pas une simple arme cérémonielle, Votre Seigneurie ? »
languages.original_text: "What gave you the notion that the blade depicted was more than just a ceremonial weapon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: « Qu'est-ce qui vous porte à croire que l'épée représentée n'était pas une simple arme cérémonielle, Votre Seigneurie ? »

languages.text: "Wie kamt Ihr darauf, dass die abgebildete Klinge mehr als eine zeremonielle Waffe war, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}?"
languages.original_text: "What gave you the notion that the blade depicted was more than just a ceremonial weapon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: "Wie kamt Ihr darauf, dass die abgebildete Klinge mehr als eine zeremonielle Waffe war, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}?"

languages.text: "Resmedilen kılıcın sadece törensel bir silahtan ibaret olmadığı fikrine nasıl kapıldınız {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"
languages.original_text: "What gave you the notion that the blade depicted was more than just a ceremonial weapon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: "Resmedilen kılıcın sadece törensel bir silahtan ibaret olmadığı fikrine nasıl kapıldınız {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri?"

languages.text: 「儀式用の武器であるだけでなく、もっと何かを意味する刃物だと考えたのは、なぜでしょうか、貴{mf|様| Lordship}？」
